title: AED 91.4 million raised: Dubai’s ‘most noble number’ charity auction supports child hunger campaign
summary_full: Dubai's Edge of Life campaign has raised over AED 1.14 billion to combat global childhood hunger. The initiative, launched by Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, saw significant pledges from international organizations and a successful charity auction of special numbers. This massive fundraising effort aims to rescue millions of children from starvation worldwide.
